sections.label: Chorus
lines: Huihpite veng mang khina, vangingte a beisiang dong,
Van a meiite beimang a khua phat
Topa, hong len in na khut kuak sung hong koih in,
Hong kem in huihpi a ven mateng.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hahkat hang a mawkna pi, dahna bei theilo pi,
Lam-etna zong om beek kei ci’n
A’ih hang Nong ompih thei ing, zing ciang thoto inah,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Zan saupi bei khinta a huihpi a ven ciangin,
Na mai-ah ka ding ding hi, tua a tang
Tua gamah huihpi omlo hong teng ning Topa aw,
